1 блок тильда
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Igor — Home</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Science+Gothic:wght@400..900&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#0A0B0D;
    --panel:#13161B;
    --panel-2:#191D24;
    --line:#262B33;
    --text:#F4F6F9;
    --muted:#8C95A3;
    --blue:#20B5FF;
    --blue-dim:rgba(32,181,255,.12);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  h1,h2,h3{
    font-family:'Science Gothic','Inter',sans-serif;
    font-weight:800;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
    margin:0;
  }
  a{color:inherit; text-decoration:none;}
  .wrap{max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 32px;}
  section{padding:90px 0; scroll-margin-top:90px;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    font-size:.78rem;
    letter-spacing:.18em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--blue);
    font-weight:600;
    margin-bottom:14px;
    display:block;
  }
 
  /* ---------- NAV ---------- */
  nav{
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:20px 32px;
    max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50;
    background:rgba(10,11,13,.85);
    backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .logo{
    font-family:'Science Gothic',sans-serif;
    font-weight:800;
    font-size:1.4rem;
    color:var(--blue);
  }
  .nav-links{
    display:flex; gap:34px;
    list-style:none; margin:0; padding:0;
  }
  .nav-links a{
    font-size:.85rem;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:.04em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--text);
    transition:color .2s ease;
    position:relative;
    padding-bottom:4px;
  }
  .nav-links a::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute; left:0; bottom:0;
    width:0%; height:2px; background:var(--blue);
    transition:width .25s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--blue);}
  .nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}
  .nav-toggle{display:none;}
 
  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr;
    gap:48px;
    align-items:center;
    padding-top:70px;
    padding-bottom:60px;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5vw,3.6rem);
    line-height:1.05;
  }
  .hero h1 span{color:var(--blue);}
  .igor-name{
    display:inline-block;
    letter-spacing:0em;
    transition:letter-spacing .35s ease;
    cursor:default;
  }
  .igor-name:hover{letter-spacing:.18em;}
  .hero p.lead{
    color:var(--muted);
    font-size:1.02rem;
    line-height:1.7;
    max-width:46ch;
    margin-top:18px;
  }
  .stats-row{
    display:flex; gap:14px;
    margin-top:32px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .stat-box{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:16px 20px;
    min-width:110px;
  }
  .stat-box .num{
    font-family:'Science Gothic',sans-serif;
    font-weight:800;
    font-size:1.6rem;
    color:var(--blue);
  }
  .stat-box .label{
    font-size:.72rem;
    color:var(--muted);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.06em;
  }
  .btn-row{margin-top:34px; display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    padding:13px 24px;
    border-radius:999px;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:.9rem;
    transition:transform .2s ease, background .2s ease, color .2s ease;
  }
  .btn-primary{background:var(--blue); color:#06131C;}
  .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px); background:#4cc6ff;}
  .btn-outline{border:1.5px solid var(--line); color:var(--text);}
  .btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--blue); color:var(--blue); transform:translateY(-2px);}
 
  /* hero card stage */
  .card-stage{
    position:relative;
    height:480px;
    display:flex; justify-content:center;
  }
  .card-stage canvas{width:100%; height:100%; touch-action:none;}
  .card-hint{
    position:absolute; bottom:6px; left:0; right:0;
    text-align:center; font-size:.74rem; color:var(--muted);
  }
 
  /* ---------- SECTION HEADERS ---------- */
  .sec-head{margin-bottom:42px;}
  .sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.3rem);}
 
  /* ---------- ABOUT ---------- */
  .about-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:40px;
    align-items:start;
  }
  .about-grid p{color:var(--muted); line-height:1.75; font-size:1rem;}
  .info-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:20px 22px;
    margin-bottom:14px;
    transition:border-color .3s ease, transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
  }
  .info-card:hover{
    border-color:var(--blue);
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(32,181,255,.18);
  }
  .info-card .tag{font-size:.72rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; color:var(--blue); font-weight:600;}
  .info-card .val{font-size:1.02rem; font-weight:600; margin-top:6px;}
 
  /* ---------- PATH A->B ---------- */
  .path-row{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:24px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    margin-top:10px;
  }
  .path-pill{
    flex:1; min-width:220px;
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:22px;
    transition:border-color .3s ease, transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
  }
  .path-pill:hover{
    border-color:var(--blue);
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(32,181,255,.18);
  }
  .path-pill .pt{font-size:.72rem; color:var(--blue); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.1em; font-weight:700;}
  .path-pill p{color:var(--text); margin-top:10px; font-size:.96rem; line-height:1.55;}
  .path-arrow{font-size:1.8rem; color:var(--blue); flex-shrink:0;}
 
  /* ---------- MENTOR ---------- */
  .mentor-card{
    display:flex; gap:28px;
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:18px;
    padding:28px;
    align-items:center;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .mentor-photo{
    width:140px; height:140px;
    border-radius:50%;
    object-fit:cover;
    border:3px solid var(--blue);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .mentor-card h3{font-size:1.25rem;}
  .mentor-card .role{color:var(--blue); font-size:.82rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; font-weight:700; margin:4px 0 12px;}
  .mentor-card p{color:var(--muted); line-height:1.7; font-size:.96rem; max-width:60ch;}
 
  /* ---------- HOBBIES ---------- */
  .hobby-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    gap:16px;
  }
  .hobby-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:22px;
    text-align:center;
    transition:border-color .3s ease, transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
  }
  .hobby-card:hover{
    border-color:var(--blue);
    transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.03);
    box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(32,181,255,.2);
  }
  .hobby-card .ico{font-size:1.8rem; margin-bottom:10px;}
  .hobby-card h4{font-family:'Inter'; font-weight:600; font-size:.95rem; margin:0;}
 
  /* ---------- PROJECTS ---------- */
  .works-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
    gap:18px;
  }
  .work-card{
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:24px;
    transition:transform .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
  }
  .work-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px); border-color:var(--blue);}
  .work-card .num{color:var(--blue); font-family:'Science Gothic'; font-weight:800; font-size:1.2rem;}
  .work-card h4{margin-top:10px; font-size:1.05rem;}
  .work-card p{color:var(--muted); font-size:.88rem; margin-top:6px; line-height:1.5;}
 
  /* ---------- CONTACT / GITHUB ---------- */
  .contact-box{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--panel), var(--panel-2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:48px;
    text-align:center;
  }
  .contact-box h2{font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.1rem);}
  .contact-box p{color:var(--muted); margin-top:10px;}
 
  footer{
    text-align:center; padding:30px 0; color:var(--muted); font-size:.8rem;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
 
  @media(max-width:860px){
    .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .hobby-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .works-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .card-stage{height:380px;}
  }
  @media(max-width:700px){
    nav{
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      gap:10px 0;
      padding:16px 20px;
    }
    .nav-links{
      width:100%;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:16px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      order:3;
    }
    .nav-links a{font-size:.74rem;}
  }
  @media(max-width:500px){
    .hobby-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    section{padding:60px 0;}
    .wrap{padding:0 20px;}
  }
  .stack{
    position:relative;
    height:230px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .stack-card{
    position:absolute;
    width:280px; height:184px;
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:10px;
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:top center;
    box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1);
    transform:
      translateX(calc(var(--i) * 6px))
      rotate(calc(var(--i) * 3deg - 4deg));
  }
  .stack:hover .stack-card{
    transform:
      translateX(calc((var(--i) - 1.5) * 230px))
      rotate(0deg);
  }
  @media(max-width:700px){
    .stack{height:180px;}
    .stack-card{width:220px; height:145px;}
    .stack:hover .stack-card{
      transform: translateX(calc((var(--i) - 1.5) * 150px)) rotate(0deg);
    }
  }
 
</style>
</head>
<body>
 
<nav>
  <div class="logo igor-name">Igor.</div>
 <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">ABOUT</a></li>
  <li><a href="#rec2417367853">PATH</a></li>
    <li><a href="#mentor">MENTOR</a></li>
    <li><a href="#hobbies">HOBBIES</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">PROJECTS</a></li>
</ul>
</nav>
<header class="wrap hero" id="home">
  <div>
    <span class="eyebrow">Welcome</span>
    <h1>Hello, I'm <span class="igor-name">Igor</span></h1>
    <p class="lead">I'm a Junior Web Designer focused on creating modern, user-friendly, and visually appealing web interfaces. I work with Figma to design layouts and pay close attention to every detail — from structure and usability to visual style.</p>
 
    <div class="stats-row">
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="num">1+</div><div class="label">Year learning</div></div>
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="num">CAP</div><div class="label">Education student</div></div>
    </div>
 
    <div class="btn-row">
      <a href="https://github.com/igorekss" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline">↗ View GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
 
  <div class="card-stage">
    <canvas id="cardCanvas"></canvas>
    <div class="card-hint">drag the card</div>
  </div>
</header>
 
<footer>made for CAP Education · 2026</footer>
<script>
/* ---------- physics-based swinging ID card (same engine as the standalone demo) ---------- */
const canvas = document.getElementById('cardCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let W,H,DPR;
 
const cardPhoto = new Image();
cardPhoto.src = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";
 
function resize(){
  DPR = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  const rect = canvas.parentElement.getBoundingClientRect();
  W = rect.width; H = rect.height;
  canvas.width = W*DPR; canvas.height = H*DPR;
  canvas.style.width = W+'px'; canvas.style.height = H+'px';
  ctx.setTransform(DPR,0,0,DPR,0,0);
  initRope();
}
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
 
const SEGMENTS = 11;
const SEG_LEN = 14;
const GRAVITY = 0.42;
const DAMPING = 0.985;
let points = [];
let anchor = {x:0,y:0};
 
function initRope(){
  anchor = {x: W/2, y: H*0.08};
  points = [];
  for(let i=0;i<=SEGMENTS;i++){
    points.push({x:anchor.x, y:anchor.y+i*SEG_LEN, px:anchor.x, py:anchor.y+i*SEG_LEN, pinned:i===0});
  }
}
 
const CARD_W = 160, CARD_H = 220;
let cardAngleVel=0, cardAngle=0;
let spinAngle=0, spinVel=0, lastPointerX=null;
 
let pointer = {x:null, y:null, grabbed:false};
 
function getCardCenter(){
  const last = points[points.length-1];
  return {x:last.x, y:last.y + CARD_H*0.3};
}
function pointInCard(px,py){
  const c = getCardCenter();
  const cos=Math.cos(-cardAngle), sin=Math.sin(-cardAngle);
  const dx=px-c.x, dy=py-c.y;
  const lx = dx*cos-dy*sin, ly = dx*sin+dy*cos;
  return Math.abs(lx)<CARD_W/2 && Math.abs(ly)<CARD_H/2;
}
function getPos(e){
  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if(e.touches && e.touches.length) return {x:e.touches[0].clientX-rect.left, y:e.touches[0].clientY-rect.top};
  return {x:e.clientX-rect.left, y:e.clientY-rect.top};
}
function onDown(e){ const p=getPos(e); if(pointInCard(p.x,p.y)) pointer.grabbed=true; pointer.x=p.x; pointer.y=p.y; }
function onMove(e){ const p=getPos(e); pointer.x=p.x; pointer.y=p.y; if(pointer.grabbed && e.cancelable) e.preventDefault(); }
function onUp(){ pointer.grabbed=false; }
 
canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', onDown);
window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
window.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', onDown, {passive:true});
window.addEventListener('touchmove', onMove, {passive:false});
window.addEventListener('touchend', onUp);
 
function updateRope(){
  for(let i=0;i<points.length;i++){
    const pt = points[i];
    if(pt.pinned){ pt.x=anchor.x; pt.y=anchor.y; continue; }
    let vx=(pt.x-pt.px)*DAMPING, vy=(pt.y-pt.py)*DAMPING;
    pt.px=pt.x; pt.py=pt.y;
    pt.x+=vx; pt.y+=vy+GRAVITY;
  }
  if(pointer.grabbed && pointer.x!==null){
    const last = points[points.length-1];
    last.x += (pointer.x-last.x)*0.42;
    last.y += ((pointer.y-CARD_H*0.3)-last.y)*0.42;
  }
  const STIFFNESS=0.4;
  for(let iter=0;iter<5;iter++){
    for(let i=0;i<points.length-1;i++){
      const a=points[i], b=points[i+1];
      const dx=b.x-a.x, dy=b.y-a.y;
      const dist=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)||0.0001;
      const diff=(dist-SEG_LEN)/dist;
      const offx=dx*0.5*diff*STIFFNESS, offy=dy*0.5*diff*STIFFNESS;
      if(!a.pinned){a.x+=offx; a.y+=offy;}
      if(!b.pinned){b.x-=offx; b.y-=offy;}
    }
  }
  const a=points[points.length-2], b=points[points.length-1];
  const targetAngle = Math.atan2(b.y-a.y,b.x-a.x)-Math.PI/2;
  let diff = targetAngle-cardAngle;
  while(diff>Math.PI) diff-=Math.PI*2;
  while(diff<-Math.PI) diff+=Math.PI*2;
  cardAngleVel += diff*0.02; cardAngleVel*=0.85;
  cardAngle += cardAngleVel + diff*0.15;
 
  if(pointer.grabbed && pointer.x!==null){
    if(lastPointerX!==null){ const dx=pointer.x-lastPointerX; spinVel += dx*0.006; }
    lastPointerX = pointer.x;
  } else {
    lastPointerX = null;
    spinVel += -0.0065*Math.sin(spinAngle);
  }
  spinVel *= 0.94;
  spinVel = Math.max(-0.35, Math.min(0.35, spinVel));
  spinAngle += spinVel;
}
 
function roundRect(x,y,w,h,r){
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(x+r,y);
  ctx.arcTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+h,r);
  ctx.arcTo(x+w,y+h,x,y+h,r);
  ctx.arcTo(x,y+h,x,y,r);
  ctx.arcTo(x,y,x+w,y,r);
  ctx.closePath();
}
 
function drawRope(){
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#0B0B0D';
  ctx.lineWidth = 13;
  ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.lineJoin='round';
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(points[0].x, points[0].y);
  for(let i=1;i<points.length-1;i++) ctx.lineTo(points[i].x, points[i].y);
  ctx.stroke();
 
  ctx.fillStyle='#FFFFFF';
  ctx.font='600 6px Inter, sans-serif';
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='middle';
  const label='CAP EDUCATION';
  for(let i=2;i<points.length-3;i+=3){
    const a=points[i], b=points[i+1];
    const mx=(a.x+b.x)/2, my=(a.y+b.y)/2;
    const ang=Math.atan2(b.y-a.y,b.x-a.x);
    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(mx,my); ctx.rotate(ang); ctx.fillText(label,0,0); ctx.restore();
  }
 
  ctx.fillStyle='#3A4250';
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(anchor.x,anchor.y,4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
}
 
function drawCard(){
  const c = getCardCenter();
  ctx.save();
  ctx.translate(c.x,c.y);
  ctx.rotate(cardAngle);
  const squash = Math.cos(spinAngle);
  const facingFront = squash>=0;
  const absSquash = Math.abs(squash);
  ctx.scale(Math.max(absSquash,0.03),1);
  const showDetails = absSquash>0.22;
 
  ctx.shadowColor='rgba(0,0,0,.45)'; ctx.shadowBlur=18; ctx.shadowOffsetY=8;
 
  if(facingFront){
    const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-CARD_W/2,-CARD_H/2,CARD_W/2,CARD_H/2);
    grad.addColorStop(0,'#171D27'); grad.addColorStop(1,'#0F141C');
    ctx.fillStyle=grad;
    roundRect(-CARD_W/2,-CARD_H/2,CARD_W,CARD_H,14); ctx.fill();
    ctx.shadowColor='transparent'; ctx.shadowBlur=0; ctx.shadowOffsetY=0;
 
    ctx.strokeStyle='#20B5FF'; ctx.lineWidth=2;
    roundRect(-CARD_W/2+5,-CARD_H/2+5,CARD_W-10,CARD_H-10,10); ctx.stroke();
 
    if(showDetails){
      const px=-CARD_W/2+15, py=-CARD_H/2+20, pw=CARD_W-30, ph=CARD_H*0.55;
      if(cardPhoto.complete && cardPhoto.naturalWidth){
        ctx.save(); roundRect(px,py,pw,ph,7); ctx.clip();
        const ir=cardPhoto.naturalWidth/cardPhoto.naturalHeight, br=pw/ph;
        let dw,dh;
        if(ir>br){dh=ph; dw=ph*ir;} else {dw=pw; dh=pw/ir;}
        ctx.drawImage(cardPhoto, px+(pw-dw)/2, py+(ph-dh)/2, dw, dh);
        ctx.restore();
      } else {
        ctx.fillStyle='#222B38'; roundRect(px,py,pw,ph,7); ctx.fill();
      }
      ctx.fillStyle='#E9EDF2'; ctx.font='700 13px Inter, sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText('Igor', 0, CARD_H*0.30);
      ctx.font='600 9px Inter, sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle='#FFFFFF';
      ctx.fillText('CAP EDUCATION 2026-2027', 0, CARD_H*0.38);
    }
  } else {
    const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-CARD_W/2,-CARD_H/2,CARD_W/2,CARD_H/2);
    grad.addColorStop(0,'#0F141C'); grad.addColorStop(1,'#0A0D12');
    ctx.fillStyle=grad; roundRect(-CARD_W/2,-CARD_H/2,CARD_W,CARD_H,14); ctx.fill();
    ctx.shadowColor='transparent'; ctx.shadowBlur=0; ctx.shadowOffsetY=0;
    ctx.strokeStyle='#20B5FF'; ctx.lineWidth=2;
    roundRect(-CARD_W/2+5,-CARD_H/2+5,CARD_W-10,CARD_H-10,10); ctx.stroke();
    if(showDetails){
      ctx.strokeStyle='#20B5FF'; ctx.lineWidth=2;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,30,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
      ctx.font='700 11px Inter, sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle='#20B5FF'; ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText('CAP',0,-2); ctx.fillText('EDU',0,12);
    }
  }
  ctx.fillStyle='#0A0D12'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,-CARD_H/2+5,4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
  ctx.restore();
}
 
function loop(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  updateRope(); drawRope(); drawCard();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}
resize();
loop();
</script>
 
</body>
</html>
